Event.Title: The Bible Collection: Genesis (1994)
Event.Synopsis: An all-enveloping darkness. Suddenly, a child's voice, frightened, questioning, pierces the darkness... The first flickering rays of light begin to sculpt mysterious shapes out of the darkness ... Among them, a very old man. He reassures the child, exhorting him to see the wonders of the earth. And it is with this child's eyes that we will witness the creation of the world. Nature comes to life at the first light of dawn, recreating the seven days of the Creation. Adam appears, and is soon joined by Eve. Paradise could be theirs, but as time goes by, they grow restless, inquisitive... They approach the Tree of Knowledge - and discover pain, suffering and mortality. Their sons Cain and Abel play out a story that will continue to darken the Creation until the end of time. And angered by the corruption of Cain's progeny, by the lust and greed ruling the cities, God vows to wipe away his creatures and begin anew. With Noah and his family. The ark is built, the animals led into their pens, and the rain begins beating on the timbers, flooding the land, bringing fear and death. When the rains have devastated the world, the waters recede, the ark touches ground, and the dove sent out by Noah returns with an olive branch - the sign of new life and of a new pact with God.

Event.Title: The Way Back Home (2006)
Event.Synopsis: Spencer Krane returns to the town where he was raised upon the news that his grandmother has suffered a debilitating stroke. What starts as a simple visit home becomes a journey of consequence.?

Event.Title: The Bible Collection: Apocalypse (2002)
Event.Synopsis: It is 90 A.D., and the Roman Empire is being run by the Emperor Domitian, who has declared himself to be God, and ruler over heaven and Earth. The Christians, who do not recognize his divinity, are a thorn in his side, and he is having them cruelly persecuted.

Event.Title: Another Chance (2015)

Event.Title: Pursuit Of Freedom (2022)

Event.Title: Johnny (2010)
Event.Synopsis: When Dr. Drew Carter lost his son in a car accident, he didn't expect to lose his wife, who was driving, as well. Even though she wasn't physically hurt, Julia has become emotionally absent to Drew and to their daughter Kayla. When Dr. Miller, a close friend of the family, sends Drew a new leukemia patient (Johnny) who is a foster child, the wheels start to turn and Drew sees a chance to heal his family. But Julia is deeply opposed to the idea of adopting this sickly kid and remains in her perpetual guilt-ridden state of grief. With Kayla feeling more and more rejected by her mother and Drew feeling more distant from his wife, he decides to take matters into his own hands and adopts Johnny anyway. Johnny doesn't know what he's in for but loves God and is convinced he's here for a special reason and soon discovers what it is when he enters the Carter's lives.

Event.Title: The Savior (2014)

Event.Title: The Bible Collection: Genesis (1994)
Event.Synopsis: An all-enveloping darkness. Suddenly, a child's voice, frightened, questioning, pierces the darkness... The first flickering rays of light begin to sculpt mysterious shapes out of the darkness ... Among them, a very old man. He reassures the child, exhorting him to see the wonders of the earth. And it is with this child's eyes that we will witness the creation of the world. Nature comes to life at the first light of dawn, recreating the seven days of the Creation. Adam appears, and is soon joined by Eve. Paradise could be theirs, but as time goes by, they grow restless, inquisitive... They approach the Tree of Knowledge - and discover pain, suffering and mortality. Their sons Cain and Abel play out a story that will continue to darken the Creation until the end of time. And angered by the corruption of Cain's progeny, by the lust and greed ruling the cities, God vows to wipe away his creatures and begin anew. With Noah and his family. The ark is built, the animals led into their pens, and the rain begins beating on the timbers, flooding the land, bringing fear and death. When the rains have devastated the world, the waters recede, the ark touches ground, and the dove sent out by Noah returns with an olive branch - the sign of new life and of a new pact with God.

Event.Title: The Bible Collection: Jeremiah (1998)
Event.Synopsis: A Hebrew prophet who abandons his family and the woman he loves in order to relay God's message in Jerusalem.

Event.Title: Anything Is Possible (2013)
Event.Synopsis: After his mother goes missing in Japan, a boy runs away and finds shelter with a wealthy philanthropist. Later, he uses his musical gifts to help save an orphanage from closure.

Event.Title: Fisherman's Friends (2019)
Event.Synopsis: Ten fisherman from Cornwall are signed by Universal Records and achieve a top ten hit with their debut album, "Sea Shanties."

Event.Title: Johnny (2010)
Event.Synopsis: When Dr. Drew Carter lost his son in a car accident, he didn't expect to lose his wife, who was driving, as well. Even though she wasn't physically hurt, Julia has become emotionally absent to Drew and to their daughter Kayla. When Dr. Miller, a close friend of the family, sends Drew a new leukemia patient (Johnny) who is a foster child, the wheels start to turn and Drew sees a chance to heal his family. But Julia is deeply opposed to the idea of adopting this sickly kid and remains in her perpetual guilt-ridden state of grief. With Kayla feeling more and more rejected by her mother and Drew feeling more distant from his wife, he decides to take matters into his own hands and adopts Johnny anyway. Johnny doesn't know what he's in for but loves God and is convinced he's here for a special reason and soon discovers what it is when he enters the Carter's lives.

Event.Title: Sarah's Choice (2009)

Event.Title: Hidden Secrets (2006)

Event.Title: Stranger Story 1
Event.Synopsis: Stranger Story tells three tales of everyday people's lives who are affected by an encounter with a modern day Jesus, taken from New Testament accounts of The Woman at the Well, Mary and Martha and the concept of being salt.

Event.Title: Heaven Is Waiting (2011)
Event.Synopsis: It has been years since Ned Stevens, a charming self-made success, lost his wife Kate to cancer. Yet he still can't let go of her memory and move forward with his life.. But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.
